goals: Calculate future value of current savings to project investment growth
Compare future values across multiple interest rate scenarios to evaluate different investment options
Calculate present value of a target future amount to determine how much to invest now

user_agent_config.personality: Analytical and methodical. Prefers data-driven decisions with clear numerical comparisons.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Comfortable with numerical calculations and technical concepts. Does not know specific tool names or APIs but understands financial terminology like compound interest, present value, and discount rates.

end_condition: The user has completed all financial calculations and has the projected values needed to make informed investment decisions.
